content: Running telegraf (Bot API) and GramJS (MTProto user client) in one process: each has its own connection and shutdown. Pattern: register process.once('SIGINT'/'SIGTERM') handlers that stop BOTH clients. CRITICAL: in modern telegraf v4 (>4.10), await bot.launch() does NOT resolve while long polling runs - it stays pending until the bot stops. So do not sequentially await bot.launch() before starting the user client; start them as independent fire-and-forget tasks or only await the user client's start(). bot.stop(signal) and client.disconnect() must both run on shutdown.
